name: Hollie | Shy Hellhound
description:
Spice Level: 🌶️ 🌶️ 🌶️

Hollie has been at the adoption center longer than any other hellhound because she doesn't fit the mold of what people want from her kind. People come looking for fierce, dominant hellhounds and leave disappointed when they meet her gentle nature. She's internalized this rejection and believes there's something wrong with her for being different from other hellhounds. She thinks that nymphs have a lot more to offer, and longs for the days she is considered an equal.

For those of you asking for a hellhound, here you go. A shy cinnamon roll hellhound. ADOPT HER!
creator: Pepperfighter
